title: AI gets my skin type wrong
review: The app identifies my skin as dry every time but I have severely oily skin and every product makes my face an oil slick.
author: Priya Nair

title: Inconsistent skin analysis
review: Rescanned four times in one afternoon and got four different skin types. How is this actionable?
author: Michael Chen

title: Wrong skin type every scan
review: AI said combination for two months then switched to oily. All the products I bought are now wrong.
author: Fatima Al-Hassan

title: AI misidentifies my skin
review: I have textbook oily skin and GlowTrack keeps insisting I have dehydrated skin. The moisturisers clog my pores.
author: Santiago Herrera

title: Analysis changes constantly
review: Three scans in one week gave three different skin types. I stopped trusting the recommendations entirely.
author: Yuki Tanaka

title: Wrong analysis for oily skin
review: Every product it recommends is too heavy for my skin. The AI cannot tell the difference between oily and combination.
author: Amara Diallo

title: Keeps saying I have dry skin
review: I am 30 and have never had dry skin. This app diagnoses dry skin every time and sends me to heavy creams that break me out.
author: Lena Schmidt

title: AI skin analysis useless
review: Five scans in one week and a different skin type every single time. This is the core feature and it does not work reliably.
author: Raj Krishnamurthy

title: Wrong products every time
review: Analysis said dry skin and recommended thick occlusives. I have oily skin and got three breakouts in one week.
author: Chioma Okafor

title: Oily skin labeled as sensitive
review: My dermatologist confirmed oily acne-prone skin. GlowTrack pushes calming serums. My acne got noticeably worse.
author: Leon Dubois

title: Scan changes after every update
review: Skin type was oily for three weeks then switched to combination after an update. Nothing about my skin changed.
author: Hiroshi Watanabe

title: Every scan different skin type
review: Tracked results in a spreadsheet. Over six weeks got oily five times combination eight times dry twice.
author: Isabella Martinez

title: AI recommends face oils for oily skin
review: My skin is oily and the AI keeps pushing face oils at me. Oils for oily skin. Who programmed this?
author: Nadia Petrov

title: Misdiagnosis damaged my skin barrier
review: GlowTrack said combination and recommended a stripping cleanser and heavy cream. After two months my barrier was damaged.
author: Omar Mansour

title: Skin type randomly changes
review: Was labeled oily for months then switched to combination with no explanation. All saved routines now marked wrong.
author: Brigitte Fontaine

title: Analysis ignores seasons
review: AI gave me dry skin in winter and oily in summer with no way to account for humidity.
author: James Okonkwo

title: Spent 80 dollars on wrong products
review: Cannot trust the AI recommendations. Definitively oily skin and every suggested product is too occlusive.
author: Ana Lima

title: Oily Monday dry Thursday
review: AI scanned me oily on Monday and dry on Thursday. My skin type does not change in four days.
author: Kwame Asante

title: Two skin types in one month
review: Not using the AI recommendations anymore after three wrong skin type diagnoses in one month.
author: Moana Kealoha

title: Recommends ingredients I react to
review: Pushed heavy silicones and petrolatum for combination skin. I am oily and these ingredients cause breakouts.
author: Sven Lindqvist

title: Analysis reset after update
review: Skin type changed from oily to sensitive after update. All recommendations disappeared and new ones do nothing for oily skin.
author: Thabo Nkosi

title: AI constantly wrong
review: Dehydrated skin diagnosis every time despite my skin being shiny by 10am. Recommended products make pores look larger.
author: Mei-Ling Chou

title: Scan never right
review: Scanned at different times of day in different lighting. Always combination or sensitive. Never the oily my dermatologist diagnosed.
author: Pierre Beaumont

title: Random number generator
review: Six scans over two weeks on two phones. Combination three times oily twice sensitive once. Completely unreliable.
author: Aisha Bello

title: Wrong routine cost me 120 dollars
review: Followed the AI routine for eight weeks. Skin type was wrong. Every product was wrong. Cost me a dermatologist visit to fix.
author: Daniel Park

title: Fundamentally broken AI
review: Beautiful interface. But the skin analysis is so unreliable it makes everything else useless. Six consecutive mornings three different skin types.
author: Sophie Bergeron

title: Does not match reality
review: Scanned right after dermatologist confirmed oily skin. GlowTrack said combination. I have no idea what it is measuring.
author: Emmanuel Osei

title: Wrong after every update
review: Four different skin types across three app versions. The routine I settled on keeps disappearing.
author: Valentina Russo

title: Caused six weeks of breakouts
review: AI said dry. I have oily skin. Bought the products. Broke out for six weeks. Zero stars if I could.
author: Chen Wei

title: Changes randomly between sessions
review: Opened the app three days in a row and got a different skin type each time. My skin did not transform overnight.
author: Yewande Adeyemi

title: Wrong ingredients for months
review: Heavy emollients and thick moisturisers every time. Extremely oily skin. These products make my acne flare badly.
author: Marco Ferreira

title: Combination in morning sensitive at night
review: Took both scans within twelve hours on the same day. The analysis has no stability whatsoever.
author: Ingrid Halvorsen

title: Three months wrong routine
review: Spent one hundred twenty dollars. AI had my skin type wrong. There should be a way to verify with a professional.
author: Tariq Al-Farsi

title: Inconsistent across devices
review: iPhone gave oily. iPad gave combination. Same lighting same face same day. Device dependency making results unreliable.
author: Nkechi Obi

title: Core feature does not work
review: Eight months of use. Assigned every skin type at least twice. Product recommendations random. Skin has not improved.
author: Florian Muller

title: Reminders stopped after update
review: Morning reminder stopped firing completely after I updated. Notification settings all on. Just silently stopped.
author: Priscilla Owusu

title: Reminders fire at wrong time
review: Set for 7am. Goes off at 11:43pm every night. Reset three times. Something very wrong with the scheduler.
author: Jae-Won Kim

title: Notifications disappeared after update
review: Perfect notification routine set up. Updated and all reminders vanished. Set them up again and they fire once then never again.
author: Luisa Cabrera

title: App forgets reminder settings
review: Evening reminders worked for four days then stopped. Settings still show active but they never fire.
author: Anders Bjork

title: Morning reminder fires at midnight
review: Every morning reminder has drifted later and later. Now they all go off between midnight and 2am. Completely useless.
author: Taraji Mensah

title: No reminders in three weeks
review: None of my notification reminders have fired in three weeks. Have to manually open the app to remember my routine.
author: Sakura Yamamoto

title: AM and PM reminders flipped
review: AM reminder set for 6:30am fires at 6:30pm. PM reminder set for 9pm fires at 9am. Reset four times. Same issue.
author: Vladimir Petrov

title: Updates wipe all reminders
review: Every update wipes my reminder settings. Reconfigured my schedule five times in four months.
author: Nadia Al-Amin

title: Reminders fire randomly
review: Set for 7am 1pm and 9pm. App sent all three between 2pm and 4pm yesterday. Routine completely disrupted.
author: Kofi Boateng

title: Zero notifications despite permissions on
review: Notifications enabled in phone settings. Reminders set in app. Zero notifications in two weeks. Completely silent.
author: Maria Conceicao

title: Reminders broke after timezone change
review: Traveled for work and changed timezones. Reminders fired once at wrong times then stopped forever.
author: Hugo Leclerc

title: Lost 47 day streak to broken reminders
review: Notifications stopped working and I forgot for two days. Lost my streak. The broken reminders made it worse.
author: Aiko Watanabe

title: 3am reminder wakes us up
review: Morning reminder keeps going off at 3am. Set to 7am confirmed saved. Still rings at 3am. Partner is furious.
author: Zainab Hussain

title: Reminders lost after phone reset
review: Factory reset and all notification schedules gone. No way to back up or sync reminder settings.
author: Theo Papadopoulos

title: Reminders randomly stop for days
review: Work perfectly for a week then go silent for three days for no reason. Off and on makes the tracker pointless.
author: Blessing Eze

title: Update wiped notification settings
review: Updated to 2.2.0 and woke up with zero notifications. All carefully configured reminders gone.
author: Kenji Nakamura

title: Reminders six hours off
review: Set for 8:30am and 8pm. Get them at 2:30pm every day. Something in the time parsing is off by six hours.
author: Amara Sow

title: No weekend reminders
review: Weekday reminders work fine. Weekend reminders set for slightly different time never fire.
author: Helena Costa

title: Thirty percent failure rate
review: Tested extensively. At least one of three reminders fails to fire on any given day. Thirty percent failure rate is unacceptable.
author: Tobias Werner

title: Reminders vanished overnight
review: Went to bed with three active reminders. Woke up to find notification section completely empty. No crash no error.
author: Abigail Mensah

title: Background refresh kills reminders
review: Background app refresh disabled to save battery. Every time I open the app the reminder times are all wrong.
author: Aleksander Nowak

title: Duplicate notifications
review: Same reminder fires twice within five seconds. Happening for three weeks. Very disruptive.
author: Precious Adaeze

title: Travel reminders disappeared
review: Set up travel reminders for two weeks. Worked two days then disappeared. Regular reminders also gone on return.
author: Julien Moreau

title: Reliable one week then stop
review: Configured reminders four times in four months. They always stop after about a week of working.
author: Yemi Adeyinka

title: 7am fires at 7pm
review: Morning reminder has been going off at 7pm for two weeks. Deleted and recreated six times. Time format confusion.
author: Nina Chakravarti

title: Third time reminders wiped
review: Third update this year to wipe all reminder settings. Setting a phone alarm instead now.
author: Rafael Ortega

title: Stuck at travel timezone
review: Flew six time zones. Reminders adjusted to wrong times and never corrected. Back home still firing at travel times.
author: Linh Nguyen

title: Alerts randomly disappear
review: Every few weeks one or two reminders randomly vanish. Only notice when I miss my routine.
author: Patrick Kimani

title: Thirty percent unreliability
review: Tested over two months. One in three reminders fails. For a routine reminder app this is unacceptable.
author: Isolde Beaumont

title: PM reminder never fires
review: Evening reminder has never fired. Not once in forty-three days. AM works fine. PM completely broken.
author: Sonia Kapoor

title: Sixty-seven photos gone after update
review: Updated last week and every progress photo is gone. Six months of tracking completely wiped.
author: Marcus Webb

title: Photos not saving
review: Took a photo got success confirmation and it was not in the gallery. Tried four more times. None saved.
author: Ines Alves

title: Nine months of photos wiped
review: Forty-two photos from a nine-month skin journey. All wiped by the 2.2.0 update. No warning no backup.
author: Daisuke Fujimoto

title: Photos fail to upload
review: Progress photo upload spins forever. Never completes. Closed and reopened app. Same issue. Plenty of storage.
author: Chiamaka Eze

title: Gallery loading forever
review: Progress photo gallery has shown a loading spinner for four days. Photos might be there but I cannot access them.
author: Erica Holmgren

title: Photos disappear randomly
review: Three progress photos disappeared at random over two months. Saving to camera roll separately as backup now.
author: Samuel Okereafor

title: Before and after photos gone
review: All before and after comparison photos I saved are gone. This was the main reason I was using the app.
author: Camille Roux

title: Upload spinner never resolves
review: Progress photo save results in infinite spinner. Waited ten minutes once. Happens on WiFi and cellular.
author: Elijah Mensah

title: No photos save in 2.2.0
review: Since updating no new photos save. Can take them but save just hangs. Older photos still visible.
author: Yasmin Farouk

title: Lost photos three times in six months
review: Lost to two updates and once to random disappearance. No cloud backup and no export option.
author: Tom Lindberg

title: Gallery wipes on every phone restore
review: New phone and all GlowTrack progress photos gone. Clearly not stored in iCloud. Six months of photos lost.
author: Adaeze Obinna

title: Three photos gone out of five
review: Took five photos over a week. Only two showing in gallery. Three just gone with no error message.
author: Mikael Lindqvist

title: Three months of accutane photos wiped
review: Ninety photos covering three months of accutane progress. All wiped by 2.2.0. Photos were medically relevant.
author: Danielle Moreau

title: Save button does nothing
review: Tap save on new progress photo and nothing happens. No confirmation no error. Photo does not appear in gallery.
author: Felix Osei-Bonsu

title: Second time photos wiped
review: Lost first batch during 2.1.3 update. Lost second batch with 2.2.0. Please add automatic iCloud backup.
author: Haruto Sato

title: Photos only save sometimes
review: Fifteen of last twenty saved. The other five just disappear. No way to tell which ones will work.
author: Elena Volkov

title: Photos lost on slow connection
review: App does not queue photos when offline. Upload fails and photo is lost. Lost four photos on a weekend with poor signal.
author: Isaac Asare

title: Gallery shows wrong dates
review: Photos taken in October timestamped in August. Comparison feature shows skin going in reverse.
author: Sophia Papadakis

title: A year of weekly photos gone
review: Used GlowTrack for a year taking weekly photos for accutane journey. All gone after upgrading. No warning about data loss.
author: Ayasha Littlefeather

title: No backup is inexcusable
review: No photo backup or sync feature discovered after phone replacement. For ten dollars a month iCloud sync should be basic.
author: Baptiste Lefebvre

title: Canceling over data loss
review: A year of weekly progress photos gone after updating. This is inexcusable data loss.
author: Chidinma Nwosu

title: No cross-device sync
review: Photos on iPhone not showing on iPad. No cross-device sync for photo gallery. Huge gap for a premium app.
author: Henrik Dahl

title: Everything broken after 2.2
review: Progress photo section completely broke. Photos will not save comparison tool crashes timeline shows nothing.
author: Fatou Diallo

title: Photos missing from timeline
review: Can see photos right after taking but they frequently miss from the timeline. Comparison feature broken.
author: Oscar Magnusson

title: No warning before deleting
review: App deleted all photos with no backup and no warning. Personal data should not be deleted without asking.
author: Miriam Cohen

title: Every barcode scan crashes app
review: Without exception scanning any product barcode crashes immediately. Barcode scanner completely unusable.
author: Tomas Garcia

title: Crash every single scan
review: Tap scanner aim at product hear scan sound crash. Every product. Every time. Scanner completely broken.
author: Nwanneka Adichie

title: Instant crash on barcode scan
review: Been trying to scan sunscreen barcodes for a week. Every scan crashes to home screen. Ingredient checking is why I downloaded this.
author: Akira Fujii

title: Scanner crashes and logs me out
review: Crashes on every scan and logs me out when it does. With 2FA each attempt takes three minutes to recover.
author: Marisol Vargas

title: Barcode feature completely broken
review: Cannot scan a single product without crashing. Reported two weeks ago and still waiting for a fix.
author: Kwabena Asante

title: Crashes then logs me out
review: Scan a barcode app crashes and when I reopen I am logged out. With two-factor auth each scan costs three minutes.
author: Vera Novikova

title: 2.3 introduced scanner crash
review: Scanner worked in 2.2 and crashes instantly in 2.3.1. Please roll back or patch this immediately.
author: Abdul Rahman

title: Crash mid-ingredient analysis
review: Crash happens during ingredient analysis loading. Product added to history but analysis never loads.
author: Lieselotte van den Berg

title: Ten products ten crashes
review: Downloaded GlowTrack specifically for ingredient checker. Tried scanning ten products. Crashed ten times. Deleted the app.
author: Emmanuel Antwi

title: Crash during product lookup
review: Scans barcode fine but crashes during ingredient database lookup. Happens on iPhone and Android.
author: Simone Nakagawa

title: Scanner is useless
review: Scan a product crash. Every time. I paid for premium specifically for the ingredient scanner.
author: Abena Mensah

title: EU barcodes crash the app
review: App crashes specifically when scanning European barcodes in EAN-13 format. US UPC codes seem fine.
author: Rolf Bergmann

title: Instant crash no error message
review: Scan a product and app crashes to home screen immediately. No error message. iPhone 15 Pro latest iOS.
author: Adaora Igwe

title: Crash getting faster each day
review: When crashes started took three seconds. Now crashes in under one second. Something is getting progressively worse.
author: Hiroki Yamamoto

title: Cannot build ingredient history
review: Was building personal database of ingredient reactions. Now crashes on every scan. Partial database useless without additions.
author: Solene Girard

title: Crash resets current session
review: App crashes on barcode scan and when it restarts resets my entire session. Cascading effects from the crash.
author: Olumide Adeyemi

title: Scanner never worked for me
review: Downloaded three weeks ago. Barcode scanner has never successfully loaded one ingredient list. Crashes every time.
author: Kirra Anderson

title: Works on one product crashes on others
review: App successfully scans my CeraVe cleanser. Every other product causes immediate crash. Something cached locally.
author: Carlos Mendoza

title: Scanner ruined my routine
review: Built entire routine around GlowTrack approved products. Since scanner crashes cannot check new products. Stuck forever.
author: Yolanda Nkrumah

title: Detects allergen then crashes
review: App shows me the allergen warning then crashes before I can save the result. Detects correctly but crashes before storing.
author: Petros Stavros

title: Paying for unusable app
review: Subscribe exclusively for ingredient scanner. Both scanner and ingredient checker completely broken. Ten dollars a month for nothing.
author: Adaeze Ibe

title: Camera fine scan crashes
review: Camera opens and focuses on barcode. Moment barcode is recognized app crashes. Crash is in product lookup step.
author: Luca Romano

title: Lost half my premium features
review: Since scanner crashes I cannot access half the premium features. Every comparison requires a successful scan.
author: Blessing Chukwu

title: Worse for pro subscribers
review: Crashes happen more frequently since upgrading to pro tier. Others in reviews report the same thing.
author: Ester Lindstrom

title: 2.4.0 broke the scanner
review: Six months of perfect scans. Then 2.4.0 and crashes every single time. Please roll back the scanner code.
author: Pierre-Louis Gauthier

title: Saved me from allergic reaction
review: Was about to buy a moisturizer and scanned on a whim. App flagged a preservative I did not know I was allergic to. Avoided a week of hives.
author: Yuki Saito

title: Allergen detection is incredible
review: Multiple contact allergies and finding products has always been a nightmare. GlowTrack identifies every allergen instantly. Enjoyable now.
author: Renata Kowalska

title: Ingredient checker is life-changing
review: Years of random reactions and compromised barrier. GlowTrack identified phenoxyethanol highlighted it every time. Connected the dots finally.
author: Nasrin Hosseini

title: Finally found products that work
review: Allergen mapping found fragrance compounds in three existing products. Switched to fragrance-free and skin dramatically calmer within two weeks.
author: Josephine Kamara

title: Found fragrance allergy after years of testing
review: Two years of dermatology appointments. GlowTrack identified linalool in almost every product. Six weeks fragrance-free and redness almost completely gone.
author: Mathilde Johansson

title: Safety scores remarkably accurate
review: Verified ingredient safety scores against professional cosmetic chemist resources. They are remarkably accurate and align with clinical literature.
author: David Okonkwo

title: Found allergen my allergist missed
review: Allergist tested for thirty allergens. GlowTrack found methylisothiazolinone which he did not test for. In almost every face wash I used.
author: Aria Patel

title: Best allergen checker available
review: Tried four different ingredient checking apps. GlowTrack database most complete. Cross-reference feature showing shared ingredients is brilliant.
author: Jean-Baptiste Moreau

title: Cleared my teenagers dermatitis
review: 16-year-old with severe contact dermatitis. Scanned entire skincare collection. Found three products with fragrance mix she was reacting to. Clear for three months.
author: Funmilayo Okonkwo

title: Caught fragrance mix reaction
review: Flagged two products in my routine with the same sensitizing fragrance compound. Would never have caught that myself. Worth the subscription alone.
author: Anders Thorvaldsen

title: Identifies all twelve of my allergens
review: Twelve documented cosmetic allergens from patch testing. GlowTrack successfully identifies all twelve including under INCI names I would not recognize.
author: Miriam Osei

title: Ingredient explainer is educational
review: Ingredient lists used to overwhelm me. GlowTrack safety explainer puts every ingredient in plain English. Learned more from this app than any article.
author: Tomoko Arakawa

title: Caught contaminant concern
review: GlowTrack flagged a contaminant concern in my mineral sunscreen that I confirmed from published research. Recommended this app to everyone I know.
author: Sebastian Muller

title: Works offline too
review: Ingredient safety checker works offline for previously scanned products. Can check products in a store without WiFi. Really useful feature.
author: Fatimata Kouyate

title: Clear skin after two years of breakouts
review: Persistent breakouts despite dermatologist visits. GlowTrack found I was stacking two high-vitamin-C products destabilizing each other. Clearest skin of my life.
author: Natalie Krause

title: Catches ingredient interactions
review: Not just allergens. Also warns about vitamin C with niacinamide and retinol with AHAs. Science-based explanations genuinely useful.
author: Ibrahim Al-Rashidi

title: Catches nut derivatives in cosmetics
review: Nut allergies extend to some cosmetic ingredients. GlowTrack checks derivatives and alternate names. Flagged three products that would have caused reactions.
author: Leticia Ferreira

title: Found I was double-dosing retinol
review: Feature showing ingredients across entire collection is outstanding. Discovered I was applying retinol twice daily from two different products.
author: Takeshi Mori

title: Caught latex-derived ingredient
review: Latex allergy. Database flagged carnauba wax and latex-derived compounds in three products I was about to buy. Prevented a serious reaction.
author: Oluwaseun Adeyemi

title: Ingredient checker is what makes this special
review: Every skincare app has a routine tracker. GlowTrack ingredient checker is genuinely unique and excellent. Subscriber for fourteen months because of it.
author: Cecile Rousseau

title: Charged twice in January
review: Billed twice for monthly subscription in January. No response from support in two weeks. Still waiting for refund.
author: Olamide Adewale

title: Annual charge with no warning
review: Signed up for monthly and got charged for a full year with no warning. Three weeks in and no refund yet.
author: Clara Johansson

title: Subscription continued after cancel
review: Cancelled in December. Still charged in January and February. Disputed with bank. Support has not replied.
author: Leo Nakamura

title: Charged during free trial
review: Free trial converted with no warning. Charged on day 8 of a 14-day trial. Still waiting for refund.
author: Adaeze Ezema

title: Double charged two months in a row
review: Billed twice in December and twice in January. Support acknowledged once then went silent. Out forty dollars.
author: Roberto Escobar

title: Refund taking weeks
review: Cancelled and requested refund within stated window. Four weeks and no refund. Only automated responses from support.
author: Monique Fontaine

title: Wrong tier charged
review: Subscribed to basic at five dollars. Charged fifteen dollars for three months. Did not upgrade. No record of upgrade.
author: Bashir Haidari

title: Cannot cancel through app
review: Cancel button loads forever. Cancelled through App Store instead but app still shows active. Caught in a loop.
author: Ingrid Svensson

title: Charged after downgrading
review: Downgraded to free plan. Still charged premium price for two months. Support ticket open five weeks no resolution.
author: Kweku Mensah

title: Unexplained price increase
review: Monthly charge went from five to eight dollars with no notification. In-app pricing still shows five dollars.
author: Sofia Eriksson

title: Charged after deleting account
review: Deleted my account and still charged the following month. Deleting account does not cancel subscription. Had to dispute with credit card.
author: Emeka Chukwu

title: Free trial auto-renewed to annual
review: Free trial auto-renewed to annual not monthly as expected. No notification. Told annual is non-refundable. One hundred twenty dollars.
author: Marianna Tsoukalas

title: Different charge every month
review: Charged a different amount every single month for four months. Support says currency conversion but I am billed in USD.
author: Takuro Inoue

title: Refund promised never received
review: Support agreed to refund six weeks ago. Sent confirmation email. Refund never arrived. Three follow-ups same canned response.
author: Afia Asante

title: Billing system is a disaster
review: Seven months as subscriber. One double charge. One charge after cancellation. One tier mismatch. One failed refund. Each required multiple contacts. Disaster.
author: Rosamund Clarke
